scripts.android:dev: bun run icon && node ./scripts/setup-android-fcm.mjs && bun --env-file .env tauri android dev
scripts.android:build: bun run icon && node ./scripts/setup-android-fcm.mjs && bun --env-file .env tauri android build
scripts.android:build:aab: bun run icon && node ./scripts/setup-android-fcm.mjs && bun --env-file .env tauri android build -- --aab
